title: About
identity: I am Pawan Kumar Sharma — a Full Stack MERN Developer currently focused on strengthening core engineering foundations and building scalable, deployment-ready systems.
positioning: My current growth phase is centered around mastering JavaScript and the MERN stack at a deep architectural level, followed by expanding into Linux systems, networking fundamentals, and modern DevOps workflows.
philosophyText: I believe strong software is built on layered understanding — from frontend logic to backend systems, infrastructure, automation, and data awareness. My goal is to build systems that are not only functional, but scalable, observable, and automation-ready.

evolution.text: Deep practice in JavaScript and MERN stack architecture — focusing on clean APIs, authentication systems, and scalable backend logic.
Building strong Linux and networking fundamentals to understand how applications behave in real-world server environments.
Learning Docker, Nginx, and Kubernetes to manage containerized environments and multi-stage deployments.
Using Python for automation tasks, data extraction from Excel and MySQL, and building analytical dashboards with Power BI.

directionText: My long-term direction is to evolve into a systems-oriented engineer capable of designing scalable architectures, automating workflows, and working with data pipelines that support AI-driven applications.
personalText: Outside structured learning, I value discipline, clarity, and long-term thinking. I approach growth methodically — building foundations first, then layering advanced concepts step by step.
